Princess Peach

Princess Peach is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. She is the princess of the Mushroom Kingdom and is often depicted as a damsel in distress who needs to be rescued by Mario from the villain Bowser.

Princess Peach is known for her pink dress, crown, and long blonde hair. She has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. She is one of the most iconic and recognizable video game characters in history.
